title: Report UI: compliance section (non-numeric, disclaimered, PDF + i18n)
acceptance_criteria: Replace CompliancePlaceholder with a real component that groups persisted P5 findings by category AND renders the non-numeric framework-signal list (observed / not observed / not evaluated). NO score, percentage, fraction, or pass/fail verdict anywhere

An inline, visually-prominent disclaimer 'Not legal advice. Not a compliance attestation. Signal detection only.' is co-located with EVERY framework block (not a single far-away line) AND rendered in the PDF/print path

i18n: add all new strings (incl. disclaimer) to every messages/*.json. If a non-English disclaimer translation is not verified, fall back to the reviewed English disclaimer string rather than an unreviewed machine translation
BACK-COMPAT: old persisted scans with no P5 findings render the existing empty/coming-soon state cleanly — no crash, no false 'not compliant'
Derive the view from persisted findings (no new DB column / no Prisma migration). npm run lint + build pass
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
